testsuite.name: PSPCardsIntegrations.payuEndToEndFlow

testcase.name: purchase
testcase.system-out: Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 900.0, Provided: 10.0 ✅ Boundary amount provided explicitly: 10.0 Generated First Name: john9dc Generated Email: nairobiPalermobb704@gmail.com select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- INR select merchant name :- Visa Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully purchaseId is not null purchaseId is not empty purchaseId format is valid: 699553c269e2a855582bd780 purchaseId length is 24 purchaseId validated successfully: 699553c269e2a855582bd780 Entered Card Holder Name: Ishan Kishan Entered Card Number: 4012001037141112 Entered Card Expiry Date: 05/30 Entered Card CVV: 123 Moved to the Pay button Clicked on the Pay button to proceed with payment Payment Success Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=true Payment Successfully Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 699553c269e2a855582bd780 Clicked on Search button UI transaction ID: 699553c269e2a855582bd780 API transaction ID: 699553c269e2a855582bd780 Transaction ID verified successfully UI Amount (raw): 10 API Amount: 10.0 UI Amount (parsed): 10.0 Currency conversion NOT applied Amount verified successfully UI Currency: INR API Currency: INR Currency matched correctly Currency verified successfully Expected Masked Card: 40120010****1112 UI Masked Card: 40120010****1112 Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null UI Currency: INR Payment Info Currency: INR Currency on Payment Info verified successfully UI Amount: 10.0 Payment Info Amount: 10.0 Amount on Payment Info verified successfully

testsuite.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 900.0, Provided: 10.0 ✅ Boundary amount provided explicitly: 10.0 Generated First Name: john9dc Generated Email: nairobiPalermobb704@gmail.com select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- INR select merchant name :- Visa Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully purchaseId is not null purchaseId is not empty purchaseId format is valid: 699553c269e2a855582bd780 purchaseId length is 24 purchaseId validated successfully: 699553c269e2a855582bd780 Entered Card Holder Name: Ishan Kishan Entered Card Number: 4012001037141112 Entered Card Expiry Date: 05/30 Entered Card CVV: 123 Moved to the Pay button Clicked on the Pay button to proceed with payment Payment Success Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=true Payment Successfully Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 699553c269e2a855582bd780 Clicked on Search button UI transaction ID: 699553c269e2a855582bd780 API transaction ID: 699553c269e2a855582bd780 Transaction ID verified successfully UI Amount (raw): 10 API Amount: 10.0 UI Amount (parsed): 10.0 Currency conversion NOT applied Amount verified successfully UI Currency: INR API Currency: INR Currency matched correctly Currency verified successfully Expected Masked Card: 40120010****1112 UI Masked Card: 40120010****1112 Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null UI Currency: INR Payment Info Currency: INR Currency on Payment Info verified successfully UI Amount: 10.0 Payment Info Amount: 10.0 Amount on Payment Info verified successfully
